title: A young woman with persistent sore throat, Epstein-Barr virus, lymphadenopathy, and aberrant CD4 + CD7- T-cells.
author_string: Goubran, Mariam, McGinnis, Eric, Stubbins, Ryan J, Nicolson, Hamish, Pourshahnazari, Persia et al.
abstract: A young woman with persistent EBV viremia and lymphocytosis had an abnormal CD4- T cell population with aberrant loss of CD7. She had a diagnosis of chronic active EBV (CAEBV), a lymphoproliferative disorder for which she ultimately required allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplantation.
